description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node Docker image and defines a single deploy stage. Add a deploy job that runs only on the master branch, caches the directories /usr/local/lib/node_modules/ and node_modules/ with cache key "deploy", and stores the same paths as artifacts. In the before_script run "npm install -g phantomjs-prebuilt casperjs" then "npm install". In the script run "node ./deploy.js". The job belongs to the deploy stage.
